sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93470" key="safhgori/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σᾰφ-ηγορίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, pecul. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Σαφήγορος</foreign>, <sense id="n93470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speaking clearly</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">truly</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Σίβυλλα</foreign> Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:12:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.12.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
